inline_review:
commit b695637a8e258169a2b3c1029fd70aceb3fca507
Author: Mike Rapoport (Microsoft) <rppt@kernel.org>

memblock: move reserve_bootmem_range() to memblock.c and make it static

This commit moves the reserve_bootmem_region() function into mm/memblock.c,
renames it to memmap_init_reserved_range(), and makes it static. It also
updates related comments and memblock test stubs to reflect these core
changes.

> memblock: move reserve_bootmem_range() to memblock.c and make it static
>
> reserve_bootmem_range() is only called from memmap_init_reserved_pages()
> and it was in mm/mm_init.c because of its dependecies on static
> init_deferred_pages().
> 
> Since init_deferred_pages() is not static anymore, move
> reserve_bootmem_range(), rename it to memmap_init_reserved_range() and
> make it static.

This isn't a bug, but there are typos in the commit message referencing the
old function names. Should these refer to reserve_bootmem_region() and
init_deferred_page() instead of reserve_bootmem_range() and
init_deferred_pages()?

[ ... ]

> diff --git a/mm/memblock.c b/mm/memblock.c
> index 6e11f81c4870..c86e894bbc5c 100644
> --- a/mm/memblock.c
> +++ b/mm/memblock.c

[ ... ]

> @@ -2283,7 +2308,7 @@ static void __init memmap_init_reserved_pages(void)
>  			if (!numa_valid_node(nid))
>  				nid = early_pfn_to_nid(PFN_DOWN(start));
>  
> -			reserve_bootmem_region(start, end, nid);
> +			memmap_init_reserved_range(start, end, nid);
>  		}
>  	}
>  }

Since reserve_bootmem_region() was renamed, should the following comment
in mm/memblock.c also be updated to reflect the new function name?

	/*
	 * Initialize struct pages for free scratch memory.
	 * The struct pages for reserved scratch memory will be set up in
	 * reserve_bootmem_region()
	 */
	__for_each_mem_range(i, &memblock.memory, NULL, NUMA_NO_NODE,
			     MEMBLOCK_KHO_SCRATCH, &start, &end, &nid) {
output:

2. However, a comment in `mm/memblock.c` (around line 975) still states: 'The struct pages for reserved scratch memory will be set up in reserve_bootmem_region()'.
3. This comment should be updated to reflect the new function name. Since this is only a comment issue, it has no functional impact."},{"problem":"Incorrect function names referenced in the commit message.","severity":"Low","severity_explanation":"1. The commit message refers to the old function as `reserve_bootmem_range()` instead of its actual name, `reserve_bootmem_region()`.
2. The commit message refers to `init_deferred_pages()` instead of the actual name `init_deferred_page()`.
3. Correcting these typos would prevent slight confusion for future code archaeology, but they have no functional impact on the code."}],"fixes":"","review_inline":"commit b695637a8e258169a2b3c1029fd70aceb3fca507
